channel.title: Posts on case (me)
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on case (me)

item.title: the courage to be seen
item.description: corny ahh title, i know - but stick with me here this first post has a few different ideas and origins from the last few years swxy’s learn in public through a colleague of mine i ended up hearing about swxy and more importantly his learn in public mentality. its a really cool rule and makes total sense, but man looking dumb is hard or at least i think it is.
